work_items.summary: Implemented phase gate to freeze Phase 4+ features until Phase 1 paper-trading validation is complete
work_items.root_cause: 25 features tracked across Phases 1–5 in Decifer_Feature_Plan.xlsx. Modules from Phase 3 (ml_engine), Phase 4 (social_sentiment), and Phase 5 (smart_execution, options_scanner) were already built and enabled in config.py while Phase 1 has 0 closed paper trades. config.py also had live_1/live_2 account IDs and aggregate_accounts wired in — Phase 4 multi-account infrastructure with no gating mechanism. No phase enforcement existed anywhere in the codebase.
work_items.resolution: Added PHASE_GATE section to config.py defining phases 1–5, Phase 1 exit criteria (200+ closed trades, 80%+ test pass rate, 30+ consecutive days), and a frozen_features dict mapping feature names to the phase required to unlock them. Created phase_gate.py with PhaseGateViolation exception, assert_feature_allowed(), validate(), validate_or_raise(), and get_status() returning a PhaseStatus dataclass. Created 31 regression tests covering all code paths and a real-config compatibility check that fails if live account IDs are set in Phase 1.

notes: Pending Amit approval before commit. Phase 1 exit criteria: (1) 200+ closed paper trades in data/trades.json, (2) pytest pass rate >= 80%, (3) 30+ days running — then Amit manually sets current_phase=2 in config.py.
